backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing the service desk backend with stable stores for clients, jobs, parts, and labor rates; includes access control, blob storage, Stripe integration, and HTTP outcalls mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking two features (REQ-87, REQ-89) related to fixing the 'Actor not available' error on the New Client page to the file ClientDetailPage.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated one- to two-sentence summaries for each frontend source file, describing purpose and key implementation details of every page, hook, and component.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC Service Desk' and mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines all TanStack Router routes, explicitly registering static routes (/clients/new, /jobs/new) before dynamic counterparts, and provides the RouterProvider wrapping the full route tree.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component with a sticky header, main content outlet, and a fixed bottom navigation bar; handles auth-based redirects to login or profile-setup using Internet Identity state.
frontend/src/components/SignatureCapture: A React component that renders a signature pad canvas, allowing users to draw, clear, save, or skip their signature, using the useSignaturePad hook and a mutation to store it.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the ICP backend, covering user profiles, signatures, clients, jobs, parts, labor rates, and estimates.
frontend/src/hooks/useSignaturePad.ts: A hook that manages a canvas-based signature pad with DPR-aware initialization, mouse/touch drawing event handlers, clear functionality, and PNG byte export.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Weekly calendar view that displays jobs grouped by EST day with drag-and-drop reordering, job cost breakdowns (diagnostic fee, labor, tax), and status badges. Includes helpers for EST timezone formatting and cost calculations.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDetailPage.tsx: Form page for creating or editing a single client, loading existing data by ID from the clients list and saving via create/update mutations with error handling for actor connectivity issues.
frontend/src/pages/ClientsPage.tsx: Searchable list page showing all clients with phone, address, and a Google review link button, navigating to the detail page on row click or to a new-client form via an Add button.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard overview displaying metric cards (total jobs, open, in-progress, complete, clients) and a recent-jobs list with status badges, restricted metric visibility to owner role.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Parts inventory management page with inline add and edit forms and a delete confirmation dialog, supporting CRUD operations via React Query mutations and restricting edits to owner users.
frontend/src/pages/InvoicePreviewPage.ts: Renders a printable/downloadable invoice for a given job, including parts, labor line items, tax calculation, and a customer signature pad that saves the signature to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/JobDetailPage.tsx: Full CRUD page for creating or editing a job, managing labor line items, parts, photos, and navigating to the invoice preview; uses local query hooks and the ICP actor.
frontend/src/pages/JobsPage.tsx: Lists all jobs grouped and filterable by status (Open, In Progress, Complete), displaying client name and date, with a button to create a new job.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Authentication page that triggers Internet Identity login and redirects to the home route once the user is authenticated.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: Two-step onboarding page where a new user enters their name and optionally captures a signature, then navigates to the home route.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page for managing labor rates (add/edit/delete) and configuring Stripe integration; owner-only Stripe section is gated by principal check.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom theme with OKLCH color tokens, Inter/Rajdhani fonts, custom shadows, border radii, and accordion/fade-in animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 43) tracking the architecture, known issues, and existing features of a mobile-first ICP service desk app for Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC built with Motoko backend and React frontend.
